arts.ttl: Chelsea dressing room's stance on title chances after closing gap on Liverpool
arts.sum: Chelsea's 4-3 win over Tottenham on Sunday moved the Blues into second in the table with four points currently separating them and leaders Liverpool with optimism growing around Stamford Bridge

arts.ttl: Arne Slot confirms ‘outstanding’ Alisson fit to start for Liverpool against Girona
arts.sum: Brazilian goalkeeper has been sidelined since October Liverpool coach keen to avoid Champions League playoff Alisson could make his Liverpool return against Girona in the Champions League at Montilivi on Tuesday night after Arne Slot confirmed that he is ready to start again. The Brazilian goalkeeper has not played since sustaining a hamstring injury against Crystal Palace at the start of October. But he completed training on Tuesday morning, flew to Spain with the team and the Liverpool coach suggested that he could start, saying that the difference he makes “speaks for itself”, even though it would be difficult to improve on the performances of his deputy Caoimhín Kelleher over the past two months. Slot also said he would pick as strong a side as possible, even though Liverpool have a five-point cushion in their push to qualify directly for the last 16 of the restructured Champions League. arts.ttl: Bad news for Liverpool as £51m target picks up ‘serious’ injury ahead of January transfer window
Alexis Mac Allister makes Liverpool transfer admission as midfielder reveals which European league he wants to play in
arts.sum: Liverpool midfielder Alexis Mac Allister opens up about his desire to play in La Liga at some stage of his career.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Ryan Gravenberch responds to glowing comparisons with Real Madrid icon
arts.sum: Liverpool's failure to sign a new No.6 in the summer has been barely noticeable thanks to Ryan Gravenberch stepping into the role and flourishing under Arne Slot this season

arts.ttl: Premier League announce TV fixture changes including huge Man Utd and Liverpool games
arts.sum: Manchester United have been selected for three TV matches in February, while Arsenal, Liverpool and Manchester City all have key fixtures being televised that month

arts.ttl: Arne Slot not convinced top-eight Champions League finish is advantage in league
arts.sum: The Premier League leaders, four points clear with a game in hand, are also currently top of the Champions League table after five successive wins.

arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister backs 'legend of the club' Mohamed Salah to sign new Liverpool contract
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister hopes Mohamed Salah can stay at Liverpool for the rest of his career, describing his team-mate as "a legend of the club"

arts.ttl: Arne Slot throws down gauntlet to Alisson in Liverpool battle with Caoimhin Kelleher
arts.sum: Liverpool could welcome back their number one goalkeeper into the side to face Girona in the Champions League but Alisson's understudy Caoimhin Kelleher has been performing superbly in his absence

arts.ttl: What happened at airport speaks volumes about Liverpool as European impact on title race made clear
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot speaks ahead of the Champions League clash in Girona as the impact on the Premier League title race
